channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google lays off hundreds, impacting Android and Pixel teams
item.description: Alphabet’s Google laid off hundreds of employees in its platforms and devices unit, The Information reported on Friday, citing a person with direct knowledge of the situation.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Waymo robotaxis make up 20% of Uber rides in Austin, data shows
item.description: Waymo robotaxis made up about 20% of rides offered by Uber Technologies Inc. in Austin in the last week of March, underscoring how consumers have warmed to the autonomous service since the companies launched a partnership early last month.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: WhatsApp has just dropped these 9 new features – including 2 that I'm not happy about
item.description: WhatsApp has just rolled out an endless list of new call and chat functions, but two of them have really rubbed users the wrong way.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Silicon Valley needs to get back to silicon
item.description: With their drab gray suits and their Buddy Holly glasses, the so-called traitorous eight don’t look like revolutionaries. Given no context, you can imagine them occupying some kind of middle-management role at a small regional bank. And yet these are the people you can thank for the digital world.
item.dc:creator: Rodrigo Aramburu, Fast Company

item.title: OnePlus Watch 3 gets surprise price hike in the US – and you can already guess why
item.description: The OnePlus Watch 3 now costs $499.99 in the US following the introduction of major tariffs on Chinese imports.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Google Challenges Microsoft's US Government Dominance with 71% Discount on Google Workspace
item.description: Google offers a 'temporary' 71% discount to all federal agencies for its Google Workspace platform, aiming to challenge Microsoft's dominance in the US government market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Two tempting budget Bluetooth turntables just landed in the UK, in time for Record Store Day 2025
item.description: Majority launches two vinyl players for Record Store Day and every other day, and you can choose with or without speakers
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Amazon CEO says it has to operate like the “world's largest startup”, urges AI investment
item.description: Jassy sees seven commonalities between Amazon and startups as he spells out the future for the company.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Yes, Nintendo Switch 2 Edition games will contain the upgrades on the cartridge, but it seems Breath of the Wild DLC will still need to be purchased separately
item.description: Nintendo has confirmed that Switch 2 Edition games will contain the full game and upgrades on the cartridge, but there's uncertainty surrounding DLC.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: GiveSendGo defends fundraiser for Texas track meet stabbing suspect
item.description: Karmelo Anthony, 17, was arrested in the fatal stabbing of another Texas high school student, Austin Metcalf.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Protect Yourself: Understanding Digital Credit Card Fraud
item.description: Learn how digital credit card fraud works and what steps to take immediately to protect yourself from unauthorized transactions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google Reaffirms $75 Billion Bet on AI Infrastructure Amid Diverging Cloud Provider Strategies
item.description: Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai reaffirms Google's commitment to spending $75 billion this year on AI infrastructure and data centers, amidst economic uncertainty and divergent cloud provider strategies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: One Tech Tip: Locking down your device when crossing borders
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Planning an international trip? Travelers should prepare for the possibility of extra scrutiny of their phones when crossing borders, especially when entering the United States. The Canadian government warned travelers in a recent travel advisory that U.S.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Siete reglas de gestión de riesgos que todo CIO debe seguir
item.description: El riesgo es inevitable. Sólo hay que mirar alrededor para ver los obstáculos tecnológicos, económicos y competitivos que los directores de sistemas de información no solo deben gestionar, sino vencer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New federal data threats demand new mitigation technologies
item.description: Gina Scinta, the deputy CTO at Thales Trusted Cyber Technologies, says new survey data provides insights for how agencies better secure data and networks. The post New federal data threats demand new mitigation technologies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: UALink releases inaugural GPU interconnect specification
item.description: The multivendor Ultra Accelerator Link (UALink) consortium has published its first specification aimed at delivering an open standard interconnect for AI clusters – and providing an alternative to Nvidia’s proprietary NVLink.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta helped build China’s DeepSeek: Whistleblower testimony
item.description: Former Meta executive Sarah Wynn-Williams is set to testify before the US Senate Judiciary Committee on Wednesday, revealing how the company’s AI model, Llama, played a critical role in accelerating China’s AI capabilities — particularly contributing to the rise of DeepSeek.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Stop typing in the Start menu
item.description: The Windows Start menu isn’t the best search tool when it comes to professional productivity. Sure, it’s convenient — it’s better than clicking your way through the entire menu to find what you need. But more often than not, it mostly just gets in your way.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Four paradoxes of software development
item.description: Civil engineers can rightfully claim that no two bridges are exactly alike. However, bridges share many known characteristics, and the materials they are built with have known characteristics. Building bridges involves many known knowns and not as many unknown unknowns as one might think.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet
item.description: Proposed TSA security requirements mark a step in the right direction for ICS/OT security. However, stricter compliance alone isn’t enough. The post For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dangers of oversharing with AI tools
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says ChatGPT learns from chats, but you should avoid sharing sensitive information to protect your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The best ways to give your old Android a second life
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how you can creatively repurpose your old unused Android devices, which are full of potential and hidden value.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4
